top_signals.title: GTT selected for the tank design of industry-first three-tank large-scale LNG Carriers
top_signals.summary: GTT announces that it has been selected by HD Korea Shipbuilding & Offshore Engineering (HD KSOE[1]), on behalf of the ship-owner BW LNG, for the tank design of the world’s first large-scale LNG[2] carriers featuring a three-cargo-tank configuration. This new design will equip four new buildings: two vessels already ordered in November 2025[3] and two ...

alerts.title: GTT selected for the tank design of industry-first three-tank large-scale LNG Carriers
alerts.summary: GTT announces that it has been selected by HD Korea Shipbuilding & Offshore Engineering (HD KSOE[1]), on behalf of the ship-owner BW LNG, for the tank design of the world’s first large-scale LNG[2] carriers featuring a three-cargo-tank configuration.
